mapper.select: select count(*) from job_post j left join enterprise_info e on e.id = j.enterprise_id and e.deleted = 0

select j.id, j.enterprise_id, e.enterprise_name, j.job_name, j.job_category, j.experience_requirement, j.salary_range, j.recruit_count, j.work_province_code, j.work_city_code, j.work_county_code, concat_ws('-', rp.region_name, rc.region_name, rct.region_name) as work_region_name, j.contact_person, j.contact_phone, j.job_description, j.publish_time, j.status from job_post j left join enterprise_info e on e.id = j.enterprise_id and e.deleted = 0 left join sys_region rp on rp.region_code = j.work_province_code left join sys_region rc on rc.region_code = j.work_city_code left join sys_region rct on rct.region_code = j.work_county_code where j.id = #{id} and j.deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into job_post ( enterprise_id, job_name, job_category, education_requirement, experience_requirement, salary_range, recruit_count, work_province_code, work_city_code, work_county_code, contact_person, contact_phone, job_description, publish_time, status, deleted ) values ( #{enterpriseId}, #{jobName}, #{jobCategory}, #{educationRequirement}, #{experienceRequirement}, #{salaryRange}, #{recruitCount}, #{workProvinceCode}, #{workCityCode}, #{workCountyCode}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{jobDescription}, #{publishTime}, #{status}, 0 )
mapper.update: update job_post set enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}, job_name = #{jobName}, job_category = #{jobCategory}, education_requirement = #{educationRequirement}, experience_requirement = #{experienceRequirement}, salary_range = #{salaryRange}, recruit_count = #{recruitCount}, work_province_code = #{workProvinceCode}, work_city_code = #{workCityCode}, work_county_code = #{workCountyCode}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, job_description = #{jobDescription}, status = #{status} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select education_code from job_post_education_rel where job_post_id = #{jobPostId} order by id
select major_code from job_post_major_rel where job_post_id = #{jobPostId} order by id
select category_dict_item_id from job_post_school_category_rel where job_post_id = #{jobPostId} order by id
select tag_id from job_post_school_tag_rel where job_post_id = #{jobPostId} order by id
mapper.insert: insert into job_post_education_rel (job_post_id, education_code, create_by) values (#{jobPostId}, #{educationCode}, #{createBy})
insert into job_post_major_rel (job_post_id, major_code, create_by) values (#{jobPostId}, #{majorCode}, #{createBy})
insert into job_post_school_category_rel (job_post_id, category_dict_item_id, create_by) values (#{jobPostId}, #{categoryDictItemId}, #{createBy})
insert into job_post_school_tag_rel (job_post_id, tag_id, create_by) values (#{jobPostId}, #{tagId}, #{createBy})
mapper.select: select count(*) from job_post_major_rel rel join job_post j on j.id = rel.job_post_id where rel.major_code = #{majorCode} and j.deleted = 0
select count(*) from job_post_school_category_rel rel join job_post j on j.id = rel.job_post_id where rel.category_dict_item_id = #{categoryDictItemId} and j.deleted = 0
select count(*) from job_post_school_tag_rel rel join job_post j on j.id = rel.job_post_id where rel.tag_id = #{tagId} and j.deleted = 0
